name: nebius-ai
description: Reads and writes Nebius Token Factory OpenAI-compatible API resources, including models, files, fine-tuning, datasets, operations, dedicated endpoints, and inference actions.

risk.read: external Nebius API reads of model, file, fine-tuning, dataset, operation, and dedicated-endpoint metadata
risk.write: external Nebius API writes and paid inference/operation side effects
risk.approval: required for every write action; destructive deletes require destructive confirmation
